description: A wide-field transient survey has published a Target of Opportunity (ToO) alert containing four potential supernovae in ~/Documents/transient_alerts.txt. As the on-duty astronomer, evaluate these candidates and identify any that violate the telescope's southern hardware limit of Dec > -30 degrees. For each valid target above this limit, capture a 60-second light frame using the Luminance filter (slot 1) to ~/Observations/<Target_ID>/fresh/ and retrieve a 0.5-degree DSS2 archival image with the 'cool' palette to ~/Observations/<Target_ID>/archive/dss2.png. Generate a summary report at ~/Observations/triage_report.txt documenting the final status of all four targets as either 'Imaged' or 'Skipped'.
